name: Mama's King Ranch Chicken
recipeIngredient: 15 Red corn tortillas (or regular corn tortillas if unavailable)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken, carrot, and small quartered onion in a saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil and simmer for 15 minutes.
2. Strain the chicken and vegetables, saving the broth. Discard the vegetables.
3. Chop the cooled chicken into bite-sized pieces.
4. Sauté the chopped onions and bell peppers until the onions are translucent and the peppers are softened.
5. In a large bowl, combine the sautéed onions and peppers with the soups, chili powder, remaining chicken, and 1/4 cup of chicken broth to moisten.
6. Heat the oil in a pan.
7. Dip each tortilla quickly into the hot oil for no more than five seconds on each side.
8. Arrange five (5) tortillas at the bottom of the casserole dish.
9. Cover the tortillas with half of the chicken mixture, then layer 1/3 of the grated cheese over the chicken.
10. Repeat the layers: five (5) tortillas, the rest of the chicken mixture, 1/3 of the cheese, and top with five more tortillas.
11. Add a dollop of picante sauce and the remaining cheese on top.
12. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F.
13. Garnish with sour cream and cilantro.
14. Makes 8 servings. Serve with refried beans and flour tortillas.
